word: As was discussed before, it was not until the 19th...
displayWord: As was discussed before, it was not until the 19th century that the newspaper became the dominant pre-electronic medium, following the pamphlet and the book and in the company of the journal.
fullText: As was discussed before, it was not until the 19th century that the newspaper became the dominant pre-electronic medium, following the pamphlet and the book and in the {{BOLD:0}} of the journal.
